title: helianthemum origanifolium subsp. conquense
intro: Helianthemum origanifolium subsp. conquense is a subspecies of the rockrose plant, belonging to the Cistaceae family, native to the Iberian Peninsula. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory effects, making it useful for treating various health issues. The plant has been traditionally used to treat digestive problems, wounds, and respiratory issues, offering health benefits such as reduced inflammation and improved wound healing. The herbal preparations of Helianthemum origanifolium subsp. conquense include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
